Package org.greenbytes.http.sfv

Interface ListElement<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - represented Java type
    All Superinterfaces:
    Parameterizable<T>, Supplier<T>, Type<T>
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Item<T>, NumberItem<T>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BooleanItem, ByteSequenceItem, DateItem, DecimalItem, DisplayStringItem, InnerList, IntegerItem, StringItem, TokenItem
    public interface ListElement<T>
extends Parameterizable<T>
    Marker interface for things that can be elements of Outer Lists.
    See Also:
    Section 3.3 of RFC 9651

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface org.greenbytes.http.sfv.Parameterizable

        getParams, withParams

      • Methods inherited from interface java.util.function.Supplier

        get

      • Methods inherited from interface org.greenbytes.http.sfv.Type

        serialize, serializeTo
